tools.name: open_page
tools.description: Open a browser page at a given URL and wait for it to finish loading.

tools.name: snapshot_dom
tools.description: Capture a DOM and accessibility snapshot for the current page.

tools.name: extract_table
tools.description: Extract a structured table from the current page into rows and columns.

tools.name: download_csv
tools.description: Download a CSV export from the current browser session to local disk.

tools.name: fill_form
tools.description: Fill a browser form with structured input data and submit it.

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the current browser viewport.
